purpose: passive measurement qualification before any Stage-B DEV world

detector.periodic_winding: lifted-coordinate inconsistency on a closed component path

tracker.nonoverlap_edge_rule: unique mutual best among qualified geometry edges
tracker.qualified_tie_rule: any qualified unselected ambiguity component is TRACKING_UNRESOLVED, never resolved dissolution plus appearance
tracker.many_to_many_rule: never force a match; mark unresolved
tracker.temporary_contact_rule: a same-frame pair of still-distinct components at periodic Manhattan support distance two is logged as contact without merging identities; any detector-level many-to-one-to-many collapse is TRACKING_UNRESOLVED and is never bridged retrospectively

turnover.initialization: q=m on the enrolled component support and q=0 elsewhere
identities: no feedback to m,n,b or tracker
turnover.retention: sum(q on current tracked support)/initial cohort mass
turnover.recirculation: current retention is authoritative; cumulative gross crossings are not a replacement estimator

ordinary_diagnostics.activity: gross native matter transport on internal and boundary faces
ordinary_diagnostics.energy_throughput: gross native bond formation work plus gross rupture release, with half weight on boundary faces
ordinary_diagnostics.bond: mean ordinary internal b is diagnostic only and cannot detect, track or classify a candidate

classifier.raw_assembly_integrity: every observation is keyed to a tracker point; area and percolation must exactly match the detected component; duplicate, orphan, missing, nonfinite or invalid observations fail closed as TRACKING_UNRESOLVED

passivity_identity: the complete sequence of physical state bytes and StepLedger bytes must be identical with instrumentation enabled or absent
